pi_items.source: setup_opencad.sh line 222 (user creation), consistent across task.json, setup_task.sh, export_result.sh, and verifier.py
setup_opencad.sh line 222 (user creation), consistent across task.json and verifier.py

export_result.sh line 28 (PHP verification script), task.json description, and verifier.py. This is the password the agent must SET, not the initial password (which is 'password123' per setup_opencad.sh line 220).
setup_opencad.sh line 218 (admin user creation) with password 'Admin123!' from line 216. Also referenced in task.json description.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires an agent to reset the password for user James Rodriguez (james.rodriguez@opencad.local) to TemporaryPass2026! using the OpenCAD Admin Panel. The admin account email is admin@opencad.local with password Admin123!. James Rodriguez's initial password in the system is password123. All user accounts and credentials are synthetic, created by environment setup scripts in the opencad_env at initialization.
